title: Repo Root Spec Config
description: Repo-wide spec-driven-development config. One per repo, at .spec/repo.json. The foundational schema every repo receives; layer and feature schemas extend the model rooted here.

setupRefVersion.description: setupref version this scaffold was generated from.

owners.description: Accountable humans/teams for this repo's specs.

data_classification.description: Highest data sensitivity this repo handles. 'regulated' (e.g. proprietary genetic/chemistry data) must only be routed to approved models — see specConfig.approvedModels and the repo overlay agentOverrides.

layers.description: Architectural layers present in this repo. Drives which layer schemas apply.

parityModel.description: Active setupref model. 'single' = spec.tech.md + components.md kept in component-ID parity.

approvedModels.description: Models allowed to process this repo's data given its data_classification.

repoProfile.description: Detected repository profile written by setupref init.

evidencePolicy.description: How evidence should be stored. setupref uses pointer evidence to keep token usage low.
